series.curator_notes: Split from Die wilden Kerle. The movie Hörspiele (Die wilden Kerle 1-6) are based on the live-action films and are a different product from the TV series Hörspiele (Folge 1-12). They have different target audiences (slightly older kids for the movies), different production styles (live-action vs animated), and different numbering systems. From a parent's perspective, these would be confusing mixed together - a parent looking for TV series episodes would not expect to find movie adaptations mixed in. Splitting them into separate series provides a clearer browsing experience.
